classifications.phrase: inflation has picked up more recently
signs of a more broadly based pick-up in inflation
Growth in private demand has strengthened
Activity and prices in the housing market are also continuing to pick up
labour market conditions remain a little tight
the pick-up in momentum has been stronger than anticipated
likely to add to capacity pressures
risks to inflation have tilted to the upside
it was appropriate to remain cautious

payload.rationale: The RBA signals a hawkish stance by emphasizing upside inflation risks, capacity pressures, and tight labour markets, while maintaining the cash rate unchanged and adopting a cautious, data-dependent approach.
